---
title: "Gottheit"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-gottheit">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }

  const cls = document.querySelector('meta[name="slot-title-class"]')?.content;
  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");
  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



Gottesname + Epitheton/-a


Beide Bestandteile sind nicht verpflichtend. Ein Gott kann nur durch seinen Namen, durch sein Epitheton, seine Epitheta oder durch eine Kombination dieser Möglichkeiten genannt werden.


## Typische Determinative

<div class='tableFixHead table-fixed'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> männlich </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> weiblich </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/01_m/0001_A40_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/01_m/0010_G7_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/01_m/0020_R8_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/02_f/0001_B7_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/02_f/0010_I64_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/02_f/0020_H8_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Determinative_typisch/02_f/0030_H8_02.png){.glyph} </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>

 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Spezifische Determinative </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Name </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Spezifische Epitheta </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜣs.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0001_st_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0010_st_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0020_st_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0030_st_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/0040_st_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Isis </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mw.t-nṯr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/01_mw.t-nTr/0001_mw.t-nTr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/01_mw.t-nTr/0010_mw.t-nTr_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/01_mw.t-nTr/0020_mw.t-nTr_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Gottesmutter </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wr.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/02_wr.t/0010_wr.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0010_Isis/epitheta/02_wr.t/0010_wr.t_Sp._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> die Große </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imn* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0020_Amun/0001_Jmn_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0020_Amun/0010_Jmn_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0020_Amun/0020_Jmn_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imn-rꜥ* </td>

  </tr>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imsti* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0001_jmstj_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0010_jmstj_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0020_jmstj_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0030_jmstj_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0040_jmstj_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0050_jmstj_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0050_Amset/0060_jmstj_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Amset </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ini-ḥr.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0001_jnj-Hr.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0010_jnj-Hr.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0020_jnj-Hr.t_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0030_jnj-Hr.t_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0040_jnj-Hr.t_05.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0060_Onuris/0050_jnj-Hr.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *inpw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0001_Jnpw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0010_Jnpw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0020_Jnpw_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0030_Jnpw_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/0040_Jnpw_sp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Spät.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/det/0001_Jnpw_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Anubis </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *imi-wt* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/01_jmj-wt/0001_jmj-wt_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/01_jmj-wt/0010_jmj-wt_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/01_jmj-wt/0020_jmj-wt_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/01_jmj-wt/0030_jmj-wt_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Imiut </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb tꜣ ḏsr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/02_nb-tA-Dsr/0001_nb-tA-Dsr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr des heiligen Landes </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *tpi ḏw⸗f* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/03_tp.j-Dw=f/0001_tp.j-Dw=f_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/03_tp.j-Dw=f/0010_tp.j-Dw=f_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/03_tp.j-Dw=f/0020_tp.j.Dw=f_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/03_tp.j-Dw=f/0030_tp.j-Dw=f_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der auf seinem Berg </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnti sḥ-nṯr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0001_xnt.j-sH-nTr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0010_xnt.j-sH-nTr_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0020_xnt.j-sH-nTr_AR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0030_xnt.j-sH-nTr_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0040_xnt.j-sH-nTr_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0050_xnt.j-sH-nTr_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0060_xnt.j-sH-nTr_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0070_xnt.j-sH-nTr_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0070_Anubis/epitheta/04_xnt.j-sH-nTr/0080_xnt.j-sH-nTr_GR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der vor der Gotteshalle ist </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *itm* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0001_Jtm_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0010_Jtm_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0020_Jtm_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0030_Jtm_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0040_Jtm_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0050_Jtm_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/0060_Jtm_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Atum </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *iwn.wy* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/epitheta/01_jwnwy/0001_jwnwy_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0080_Atum/epitheta/01_jwnwy/0010_jwnwy_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Heliopolitaner </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *itn* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0001_jtn_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0010_jtn_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0020_jtn_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0030_jtn_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/0040_jtn_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Aton </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥnḫ ḥr-ꜣḫ.ti ḥꜥy m ꜣḫ.t m rn⸗f m jt Rꜥ jy m jtn* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/01_anx-Hr-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t-m-rn=f-m-jt-Ra-jj-m-jtn/0001_anx-Hr-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/01_anx-Hr-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t-m-rn=f-m-jt-Ra-jj-m-jtn/0010_m-rn=f-m-jt-Ra-jj-m-jtn_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Es lebe der horizontische Horus (Re-Harachte), der im Lichtland (am Horizont) jubelt in seinem Namen als Schu, der in der Sonnenscheibe (Aton) ist </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥnḫ rꜥ-ḥqꜣ-ꜣḫ.ti ḥꜥy m ꜣḫ.t m rn⸗f m šw nty m jtn* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/02_anx-ra-HqA-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t-m-rn=f-m-Sw-nty-m-jtn/0001_anx-ra-HqA-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/02_anx-ra-HqA-Ax.tj-Hay-m-Ax.t-m-rn=f-m-Sw-nty-m-jtn/0010_m-rn=f-m-Sw-nty-m-jtn_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Es lebe Re, der horizontische Herrscher, der im Lichtland (am Horizont) jubelt in seinem Namen als Re, der Vater, der als Sonnenscheibe (Aton) kommt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pꜣ itn ꜥnḫ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/06_pA-jtn-anx/0001_pA-jtn-anx_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> die lebende Sonnenscheibe </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *jmj itn⸗f* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0090_Aton/epitheta/08_jmj-jtn=f/0001_jmj-jtn=f_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> in seiner Sonnenscheibe </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wpi-wꜣ.wt* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0100_Wepwaut/0001_wpj-wA.wt_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0100_Wepwaut/0010_wpj-wA.wt_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0100_Wepwaut/0020_wpj-wA.wt_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0100_Wepwaut/0040_wpj-wA.wt_04.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Wepwaut </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wsir* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0001_wsjr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0010_wsjr_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0020_wsjr_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0030_wsjr_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0040_wsjr_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0050_wsjr_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0060_wsjr_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0070_wsjr_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0080_wsjr_GR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/0090_wsjr_GR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/det/0001_wsjr_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Osiris </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb ꜣbḏw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0001_nb-AbDw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0010_nb-AbDw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0020_nb-AbDw_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0030_nb-AbDw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/01_nb-AbDw/0040_nb-AbDw_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr von Adydos </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb ḏd.w* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0001_nb-Dd.w_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0010_nb-Dd.w_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0020_nb-Dd.w_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0030_nb-Dd.w_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0040_nb-Dd.w_05.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0050_nb-Dd.w_06.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0060_nb-Dd.w_07.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0070_nb-Dd.w_08.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/02_nb-Dd.w/0080_nb-Dd.w_Pyr._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Pyr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr von Busiris </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb tꜣ ḏsr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/03_nb-tA-Dsr/0001_nb-tA-Dsr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr des heiligen Landes </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *m tꜣ ḏsr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/04_m-tA-Dsr/0001_m-tA-Dsr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> im heiligen Land </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnt.y imn.ty.w* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0001_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0010_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0020_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0030_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0040_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_Pyr._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Pyr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0050_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/05_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w/0060_xnt.y-jmn.ty.w_typ.-ab-NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(ab NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Erste der Westlichen (Chontamenti) </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnt.y imn.ty.w* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/06_xnt.y-jmn.t.t/0001_xnt.y-jmn.t.t_seit-NR_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/06_xnt.y-jmn.t.t/0010_xnt.y-jmn.t.t_seit-NR_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Erste des Westens (Chontamenti) </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḫnt.y tꜣ ḏsr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0110_Osiris/epitheta/07_xnt.y-tA-Dsr/0001_xnt.y-tA-Dsr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Erste des heiligen Landes </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *bꜣst.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0120_Bastet/0001_bAst.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0120_Bastet/0010_bAst.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0120_Bastet/0020_bAst.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Bastet </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *bḥd.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/0001_bHd.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/0010_bHd.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/0020_bHd.t_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/0030_bHd.t_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/det/0001_bHd.t_det_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Behedeti </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pri m ꜣḫ.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/epitheta/01_prj-m-Ax.t/0001_prj-m-Ax.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der aus der Horizont hervorkommt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sꜣb šw.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/epitheta/02_sAb-Sw.t/0001_sAb-Sw.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0130_Behedeti/epitheta/02_sAb-Sw.t/0010_sAb-Sw.t_D.18_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Buntgefiederter </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *psḏ.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0001_psD.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0010_psD.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0020_psD.t_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0030_psD.t_AR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0040_psD.t_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0050_psD.t_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0060_psD.t_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/0070_psD.t_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/det/0001_psD.t_det_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/det/0010_psD.t_det_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/det/0020_psD.t_det_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/det/0030_psD.t_det_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Götterneunheit </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥꜣ.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0001_aA.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0010_aA.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0020_aA.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0030_aA.t_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0040_aA.t_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/01_aA.t/0050_aA.t_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> die große </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nḏs.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/02_nDs.t/0001_nDs.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/02_nDs.t/0010_nDs.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/02_nDs.t/0020_nDs.t_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/02_nDs.t/0030_nDs.t_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0140_Goetterneunheit/epitheta/02_nDs.t/0040_nDs.t_Sp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> die kleine </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ptḥ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0150_Ptah/0001_ptH_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0150_Ptah/det/0001_ptH_det_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0150_Ptah/det/0010_ptH_det_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Ptah </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mꜣꜥ.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0001_mAa.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0010_mAa.t_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0020_mAa.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0030_mAa.t_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0040_mAa.t_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0050_mAa.t_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0060_mAa.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0070_mAa.t_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0080_mAa.t_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0160_Maat/0090_mAa.t_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *min* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0170_Min/0001_mjn_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0170_Min/0010_mjn_AR_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0170_Min/0020_mjn_NR_01.png){.glyph} </td>

  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mw.t* </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Mut </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>

  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb.t išrw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/epitheta/01_nb.t-jSrw/0001_nb.t-jSrw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/epitheta/01_nb.t-jSrw/0010_nb.t-jSrw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0180_Mut/epitheta/01_nb.t-jSrw/0020_nb.t-jSrw_GR_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Die Herrin des Hufeisensees </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *mnṯw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0001_mnTw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0010_mnTw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0020_mnTw_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0030_mnTw_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/0040_mnTw_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">

<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb wꜣs.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0001_nb-WAs.t_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0010_nb-WAs.t_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0020_nb-WAs.t_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0030_nb-WAs.t_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0040_nb-WAs.t_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0050_nb-WAs.t_NR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0060_nb-WAs.t_Sp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0190_Month/epitheta/01_nb-wAs.t/0070_nb-WAs.t_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>  </sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr von Theben </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ni.t* </td>

  </tr>

  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥꜥpi* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0001_Hapj_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0010_Hapj_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0020_Hapj_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0030_Hapj_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0040_Hapj_MR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0050_Hapj_MR_05.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0060_Hapj_MR_06.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0070_Hapj_Sait._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Saït.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0080_Hapj_Sait._02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Saït.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0090_Hapj_SP-GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.–Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0100_Hapj_SP-GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.–Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/0110_Hapj_SP-GR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.–Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/det/0001_Hapj_det_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0280_Hapi-Nilgott/det/0010_Hapj_det_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Hapi (Nilgott) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥw.t-ḥr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0290_Hathor/0001_Hwt-Hr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0290_Hathor/0010_Hwt-Hr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0290_Hathor/0020_Hwt-Hr_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Hathor </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥp* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/0001_Hp_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/0010_Hp_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/0020_Hp_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/0030_Hp_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/det/0001_Hp_det_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/det/0010_Hp_det_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/det/0020_Hp_det_AR-SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR; Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Apis </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜥnḫ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0300_Apis/epitheta/01_anx/0001_anx_seit-NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit NR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Lebende </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥpy* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0001_Hpy_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0010_Hpy_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0020_Hpy_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0030_Hpy_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0040_Hpy_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0050_Hpy_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/0060_Hpy_MR-NR-GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR; NR; Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/det/0001_Hpy_det_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0310_Hapi-Horussohn/det/0010_Hpy_det_AR_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Hapi (Horussohn) </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/0001_Hr_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/0010_Hr_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/0020_Hr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/0030_Hr_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Horus </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> <details><summary>Öffne</summary><div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *m ꜣḫ.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_m-Ax.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> im Horizont </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nḏ it* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_nD-jt_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der den Vater grüßt </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pꜣ ẖrd* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_pA-Xrd_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Spät.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> das Kind </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sꜣ s.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_sA-s.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Sohn der Isis </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *smꜣ tꜣ.wy* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_smA-tA.wj_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Vereiniger der beiden Länder </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *wr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0320_Horus/epitheta/0001_wr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> der Große </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details> </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥr-ꜣḫ.ti* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0330_Harachte/0001_Hr-Axtj_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0330_Harachte/0010_Hr-Axtj_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0330_Harachte/0020_Hr-Axtj_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Harachte </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥqt* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0340_Heqet/0001_Hqt_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0340_Heqet/0010_Hqt_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Heqet </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ẖnm.w* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0001_Xnm.w_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0010_Xnm.w_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0020_Xnm.w_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0030_Xnm.w_04.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0040_Xnm.w_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0350_Chnum/0050_Xnm.w_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Chnum </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ẖnsw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0360_Chons/0001_Xnsw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0360_Chons/0010_Xnsw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0360_Chons/0020_Xnsw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Chons </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sbk* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0370_Sobek/0001_sbk_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0370_Sobek/0010_sbk_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0370_Sobek/0020_sbk_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0370_Sobek/0030_sbk_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup> </td>

  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *srq.t* </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sḫm.t* </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> *stẖ* </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Seth </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *šw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0001_Sw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0010_Sw_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0020_Sw_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0030_Sw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0420_Schu/0040_Sw_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>

   <td style="text-align:left;"> Schu </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *qbḥ-snw⸗f* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0001_qbH-snw=f_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0010_qbH-snw=f_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0020_qbH-snw=f_03.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0030_qbH-snw=f_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0040_qbH-snw=f_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0050_qbH-snw=f_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0060_qbH-snw=f_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0070_qbH-snw=f_GR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/0080_qbH-snw=f_GR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/det/0001_qbH-snw=f_det_GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0430_Qebehsenuef/det/0010_qbH-snw=f_det_GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Qebehsenuef </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *dwꜣ-mw.t⸗f* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0001_dwA-mw.t=f_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0010_dwA-mw.t=f_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0020_dwA-mw.t=f_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0030_dwA-mw.t=f_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0440_Duamutef/0040_dwA-mw.t=f_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Duamutef </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḏḥwty* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0001_DHwtj_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0010_DHwtj_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0020_DHwtj_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0030_DHwtj_MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0040_DHwtj_MR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0050_DHwtj_MR_05.png){.glyph} <sup>(MR)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0060_DHwtj_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0070_DHwtj_SP_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0080_DHwtj_SP-GR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.; Gr.)</sup><span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/0090_DHwtj_SP-GR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.; Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Gottheit/Goetter-mit-Epitheta/0450_Thot/det/0001_DHwtj_det_SP_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Thot </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div></details>

```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
